message:
🐛 Allow mission browse/file API calls without authentication (#1535)

The frontend API client was blocking all GET requests when no valid JWT
token was present (demo mode or pre-login). Mission browse and file
endpoints are public on the backend (no auth middleware), but the
client-side hasToken() check was rejecting them before they could reach
the server.

Add PUBLIC_API_PREFIXES list to auto-detect public paths and skip the
auth requirement for /api/missions/browse and /api/missions/file.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
